title: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#F7F7F7`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50, 50)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/><rect x='10' y='10' width='180' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='210' y='10' width='80' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='10' y='60' width='180' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='210' y='60' width='80' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><g transform='translate(60, 70)'><circle cx='20' cy='10' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='40' y='20' font-size='16' fill='#000'>John Doe</text></g><!-- User Avatar and Profile --><g transform='translate(220, 70)'><circle cx='20' cy='10' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='40' y='20' font-size='16' fill='#000'>Jane Doe</text></g><!-- Search Bar and Messages Toggle --><rect x='10' y='100' width='180' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><g transform='translate(60, 110)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='20' y='20' font-size='12' fill='#000'>Search</text></g><g transform='translate(160, 110)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='20' y='20' font-size='12' fill='#000'>By Sender</text></g><!-- Chat Messages --><g transform='translate(10, 140)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='100' fill='#F7F7F7'/><g transform='translate(10, 10)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='20' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#000'>John Doe: Message 1</text></g><g transform='translate(10, 30)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='20' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#000'>Jane Doe: Message 2</text></g><g transform='translate(10, 50)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='180' height='20' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='20' y='20' font-size='14' fill='#000'>John Doe: Message 3</text></g></g></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the provided palette and maintain layout fidelity.
The chat messages should be filtered by either sender or timestamp upon clicking the respective toggle button.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the chat messages filtering functionality and the search bar's responsiveness.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
